title: 作左首英文歌叫Carrie Lam till tomorrow

replies.msg:
In younger days, they told ourselves Hong Kong would be his own
And I'd found this place where justice never severed
For my life's too short for waiting when I see the five demands
Then I know again that I must Carrie Lam

Carrie Lam till tomorow, there's no reason to hold back
Beyond the shadows of tear gas and onward to the sky
Carry lam till I find the protest's end
For my life's too short for waiting when I see the five demands
Then I know again that I must carrie lam

Drifting on the wings of freedom, leave this smoky day
And we'll ride to tomorrow's bottom pot
For my life's too short for waiting when I see the five demands
Then I know again that I must carrie lam

Carrie lam, carrie lam, carrie lam

And when the heavy journey's done, I'll wash my dirty head
For the world and it's colors will be blue
For my life's too short for waiting when I see the five demands
Then I know again that I must carrie lam

Carrie lam till tomorrow, there's no reason to hold back

Carrie lam, carrie lam, carrie lam
